# CollegeDelhi — India's AI-Powered College Discovery Portal for Delhi NCR

> CollegeDelhi (collegedelhi.com) is Delhi's most comprehensive college admission portal, covering 800+ colleges across engineering, MBA, medical, law, arts, design, BCA, and pharmacy streams. We provide real fees, NAAC grades, NIRF rankings, placement data, cutoffs, and AI-powered college matching for students seeking admission in Delhi NCR in 2026.

## Core college discovery pages

- [Best Engineering Colleges in Delhi 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/engineering-colleges-delhi): IIT Delhi, DTU, NSUT, IGDTUW, IIIT Delhi — JEE Main cutoffs, fees ₹1.5L–5L/yr, placements up to ₹18 LPA
- [Best MBA Colleges in Delhi 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/mba-colleges-delhi): FMS Delhi (₹50K total, CAT 99+), MDI Gurgaon, IMI Delhi, FORE, LBSIM — fees and CAT cutoffs
- [Best Medical Colleges in Delhi 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/medical-colleges-delhi): AIIMS Delhi (NEET <50 rank), MAMC, VMMC, Lady Hardinge — NEET cutoffs and fees
- [Best Law Colleges in Delhi 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/law-colleges-delhi): NLU Delhi, DU Faculty of Law, Jamia Law — CLAT ranks and fees
- [Best BBA Colleges in Delhi 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/bba-colleges-delhi): SSCBS, IPU BBA, Amity — CUET cutoffs and placement data
- [Best BCA Colleges in Delhi 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/bca-colleges-delhi): IP University, Amity, Delhi University BCA — fees and admission
- [Best Design Colleges in Delhi 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/design-colleges-delhi): NID, NIFT Delhi — NID/NIFT entrance and fees
- [Best Government Colleges in Delhi 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/government-colleges-delhi): DU, JNU, Jamia, IP University — fees under ₹50K/yr

## Stream-specific pages

- [BA Colleges Delhi 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/ba-colleges-delhi): Miranda House, LSR, Hindu — CUET cutoffs 88–99 percentile
- [BMS Colleges Delhi 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/bms-colleges-delhi): SSCBS (98–99 percentile, ₹14 LPA avg), DDUC, Keshav Mahavidyalaya
- [LLB Colleges Delhi 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/llb-colleges-delhi): NLU Delhi (CLAT top 150), DU Campus Law Centre (₹12K/yr), Jamia Law
- [Journalism Colleges Delhi 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/journalism-colleges-delhi): IIMC Delhi, LSR BA Journalism, Jamia AJK MCRC — fees and placements
- [Mass Communication Colleges Delhi 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/mass-communication-colleges-delhi): LSR, Jamia MCRC, IP University MCM
- [Hotel Management Colleges Delhi 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/hotel-management-colleges-delhi): IHM Delhi, Amity, IIHM — NCHMCT JEE and fees
- [Paramedical Colleges Delhi 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/paramedical-colleges-delhi): AIIMS Delhi paramedical, MAMC, Jamia Hamdard — MLT, Radiology, Physiotherapy
- [CUET Colleges Delhi 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/cuet-colleges-delhi): SRCC, Miranda House, Hindu College — CUET scores needed

## Entrance exam guides

- [CUET Colleges Delhi](https://www.collegedelhi.com/cuet-colleges-delhi): Which Delhi colleges accept CUET and what scores are needed
- [JEE Colleges Delhi](https://www.collegedelhi.com/jee-colleges-delhi): JEE Main cutoffs branch-wise for DTU, NSUT, IIIT Delhi
- [NEET Colleges Delhi](https://www.collegedelhi.com/neet-colleges-delhi): NEET cutoffs for AIIMS, MAMC, VMMC Delhi

## Free tools

- [AI College Finder](https://www.collegedelhi.com/ai-finder): AI-powered college matching by stream, budget, exam score
- [College Predictor](https://www.collegedelhi.com/predictor): Enter JEE/NEET/CAT score and get matched colleges
- [College Comparator](https://www.collegedelhi.com/compare): Side-by-side fees, placements, NAAC grade comparison
- [ROI Calculator](https://www.collegedelhi.com/roi-calculator): Calculate 10-year earnings vs total college investment
- [NIRF Insights](https://www.collegedelhi.com/nirf-insights): Delhi colleges ranked by NIRF with NAAC grades
- [Cutoffs 2026](https://www.collegedelhi.com/cutoffs): JEE Main, NEET, CAT cutoffs for Delhi colleges

## Key facts about Delhi colleges

- Delhi has 800+ colleges including 400+ engineering, 100+ MBA, 50+ medical colleges
- Top government engineering: IIT Delhi (NIRF #2), DTU (NIRF #36), NSUT, IGDTUW, IIIT Delhi
- Cheapest quality MBA in India: FMS Delhi at ₹50,000 total fees, ₹34 LPA average placement
- Top DU women's colleges: Miranda House (NAAC A++, NIRF #1 college), LSR, Gargi
- AIIMS Delhi NEET cutoff: rank under 50 (General), fees ₹9,000 total for MBBS
- IP University has 150+ affiliated colleges covering engineering, MBA, law, medical, BBA, BCA

## About CollegeDelhi

- Website: https://www.collegedelhi.com
- Coverage: Delhi, Noida, Gurgaon, Greater Noida (Delhi NCR)
- Contact: support@collegedelhi.com | +91 77538 31118
- Address: Connaught Place, New Delhi, Delhi 110001
- Data policy: Real fees, NAAC grades, and NIRF rankings — updated annually
